# REBAR SHOP AI VIDEO

> Forge cinematic AI videos, soundtracks, and voiceovers in one studio — an AI video ad generator built on Wan/Flow providers.

REBAR SHOP AI VIDEO (Prompt Forge) turns product photos and prompts into promotional video ads, with camera-style presets, scene styles, character and product identity locking, and generated voiceovers.

## Pages

- [AI Video Ad Generator](/): Create AI video ads from prompts and product images, choose camera and scene styles, and generate voiceovers.
